items.name: Local VPS Orchestrator
items.desc: Local resource orchestrator for VPS systems running Linux. Manages simple resources and metrics as well as advanced automation pipelines for self-hosted infrastructure.
items.long_desc: Designed and built as part of the AI Development Master's program. Provides a unified interface to monitor CPU, memory and disk usage, schedule automated tasks via cron, and restart services — all from a single CLI tool.

items.name: YouKnow
items.desc: Mobile social network app for chatting, grouping and playing educational games with gamification mechanics built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.
items.long_desc: Bachelor's degree final project. A full-featured Android app integrating real-time Firebase Firestore, Firebase Auth and Firebase Storage. Users can create study groups, challenge friends to quizzes, earn XP points and climb leaderboards.

items.name: Codewars Katas
items.desc: Repository with solutions to Codewars katas in multiple programming languages, tackling complex algorithmic and data-structure challenges.
items.long_desc: Ongoing personal kata repository focused on sharpening algorithmic thinking. Solutions cover sorting, dynamic programming, graph traversal, string manipulation and more, written in Kotlin and C#.
